post-install-output: <bg=blue;fg=white>  JsonRpc Server — JSON-RPC 2.0 for Symfony is ready to use     </>
<fg=green>•</> Routes import: <fg=yellow>config/routes/json_rpc_server.yaml</> (required — paths live in packages config)
<fg=green>•</> Default paths: <fg=yellow>/rpc</>, <fg=yellow>/rpc/stream</> (MCP <fg=yellow>/mcp/*</> off — flip <fg=yellow>mcp.enabled: true</>; OpenRPC <fg=yellow>/rpc.openrpc.json</> dev-only)
